title: Aonorai's 3D Wings
body:
This pack simply changes the Vanilla Elytra model and texture into 3D Angel-like Wings!!

![Cool pose using the Silly Moves pack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a71ebe6b1ed6a379e37af502561a3bbdb797578.png)

![Wing span during flight!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20983fe8c5d18a356a0a77bf277db9db63248f47.png)
